title: Az-Stamper Subscription Configuration
description: Per-subscription tag overrides and resource-type rules for Az-Stamper multi-subscription deployments.

subscriptions.description: Map of subscription IDs to their configuration.

enabled.description: Whether tagging is enabled for this subscription. Set to false to skip all events.

tagOverrides.description: Tags to add or override on top of global defaults.

resourceTypeRules.description: Per-resource-type tag rules. Keys are Azure resource type strings (e.g., Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines).

additionalIgnorePatterns.description: Additional resource ID patterns to ignore (combined with global ignore list).

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite an existing tag with the same name.

additionalTags.description: Tags to add only for this resource type.

excludeTags.description: Tag names to exclude from this resource type.
